critical_checks.keyboard_nav: Can I reach every button using only the Tab key?
critical_checks.focus_trap_active: Do modals prevent tabbing back into the background map?
critical_checks.color_contrast: Do the primary/accent colors meet 4.5:1 against the background?
critical_checks.alt_text: Do all static images and dynamic map icons have alternative text?
critical_checks.label_association: Are all form inputs wrapped or linked to <label> elements?
critical_checks.motion_safety: Is there a way to disable the Antigravity 'Fly-to' animation?
